C

Cards - Class in battleship.model
The Cards class contains all data to represent the game elements of Battleship.
Cards(String) - Constructor for class battleship.model.Cards
Creates a new Cards object of type 'missed'.
Cards(String, char, String) - Constructor for class battleship.model.Cards
Creates a new Cards object of type 'mayday'
Cards(String, int, char, String) - Constructor for class battleship.model.Cards
Creates a new Cards object of type 'ship'.
Cards(String, String, int, String) - Constructor for class battleship.model.Cards
Creates a new Cards object of type 'missile'
cardsG - Variable in class battleship.view.Battleship
 
CardsG - Class in battleship.view
CardsG that is sent between players at the beginning of the game.
CardsG(ArrayList<Cards>, String) - Constructor for class battleship.view.CardsG
Creates CardsG instance.
CardsTest - Class in battleship.model
unit tests for the `Cards` class.
CardsTest() - Constructor for class battleship.model.CardsTest
 
cGSent - Variable in class battleship.view.Battleship
 
ClientServerThread - Class in battleship.view
This is a thread that can be either a client or a server.
ClientServerThread(Battleship, String, int) - Constructor for class battleship.view.ClientServerThread
Constructor for thread.
color - Variable in class battleship.model.Cards
 
connect() - Method in class battleship.view.ClientServerThread
Creates a new connection either as a client or as a server.
controller - Variable in class battleship.view.Battleship
 
createMayDay(String) - Method in class battleship.model.BattleshipGame
Creates all mayday cards of game and saved these in corresponding list.
createMissed(String) - Method in class battleship.model.BattleshipGame
Creates all missed out cards of game and saved these in corresponding list.
createMissiles(String) - Method in class battleship.model.BattleshipGame
Creates all missile cards of game and saved these in corresponding list.
createShips(String) - Method in class battleship.model.BattleshipGame
Creates all ship cards of game and saved these in corresponding list.
cruiserBlue - Variable in class battleship.model.CardsTest
 
cruiserRed - Variable in class battleship.model.CardsTest
